name: Shubham Shah
org: Assetnote (co-founder, acquired by Netlify 2022); previously Atlassian
why_notable: Built the Assetnote wordlist pipeline — an automated system that regenerates technology-specific wordlists monthly from Common Crawl data. The key insight: rather than a static list curated once, generate fresh lists from current web crawl data to capture new endpoints, frameworks, and paths as they emerge. Co-founded Assetnote (ASM platform + free wordlists), acquired by Netlify in 2022. Also known for SSRF research, host header attack techniques, and subdomain takeover methodology.
